changeSet.author: howners
changeSet.comment: Backfill purchase_price and recurring charges on the 6 seed properties so the yield calculations show real numbers.

changeSet.author: howners
changeSet.comment: Seed 4 ACTIVE rentals matching seed tenants to seed properties so yield/cash-flow computations have meaningful numbers.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO rentals (id, property_id, tenant_id, rental_type, status, start_date, monthly_rent, currency, deposit_amount, charges, payment_day, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('d0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', 'a0000001-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant3@howners.test'), 'LONG_TERM', 'ACTIVE', '2026-01-01', 850, 'EUR', 1700, 50, 5, NOW() - INTERVAL '4 months', NOW());

INSERT INTO rentals (id, property_id, tenant_id, rental_type, status, start_date, monthly_rent, currency, deposit_amount, charges, payment_day, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('d0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', 'a0000001-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant1@howners.test'), 'LONG_TERM', 'ACTIVE', '2025-11-15', 1750, 'EUR', 3500, 110, 5, NOW() - INTERVAL '6 months', NOW());

INSERT INTO rentals (id, property_id, tenant_id, rental_type, status, start_date, monthly_rent, currency, deposit_amount, charges, payment_day, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('d0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', 'a0000002-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='tenant2@howners.test'), 'LONG_TERM', 'ACTIVE', '2025-09-01', 1380, 'EUR', 2760, 90, 1, NOW() - INTERVAL '8 months', NOW());

INSERT INTO rentals (id, property_id, tenant_id, rental_type, status, start_date, monthly_rent, currency, deposit_amount, charges, payment_day, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('d0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000004', 'a0000001-0000-0000-0000-000000000004', (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email='ines.bernard@howners.test'), 'LONG_TERM', 'ACTIVE', '2026-03-01', 2400, 'EUR', 4800, 180, 5, NOW() - INTERVAL '2 months', NOW());
